cases.title: Testing-plan §3 Manual correction governance row covers lecturer scope, edit window, and reason mandate
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Manual correction governance block applies (FR-20, FR-21, BR-14/15/16, AC-13, AC-14).
Assigned Lecturer exists for class section; effective policy defines manualEditWindow from session close.
Closed session has enrolled student with AttendanceRecord status Absent from close-time finalization.
steps: Resolve effective policy for class section and confirm manualEditWindow is active.
Authenticate as assigned Lecturer for the session class section.
Submit PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and documented reason within window.
Query AttendanceRecord and AuditLog for the student-session pair.
Advance fixture clock beyond manualEditWindow and repeat lecturer PATCH attempt.
cases.expected: Scenario-matrix maps to testing-plan Manual correction governance: in-window correction succeeds per BR-14 with audit; post-window lecturer attempt is rejected or escalated per BR-15 and AC-14 without unauthorized mutation.

cases.title: M05 Attendance Ledger correctAttendance persists status change and audit row in DB transaction
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for M05 Attendance Ledger and M08 Audit and Compliance modules.
Closed session exists with enrolled student AttendanceRecord status Absent.
Assigned Lecturer is within manualEditWindow per M06 policy resolution.
Policy mandates reason for manual corrections.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Absent, checkInMethod null or system-assigned.
Invoke M05 correctAttendance through application service with status Manual Present, reason, actor Lecturer, and Idempotency-Key.
Query attendance_records and audit_logs tables for target studentUserId and classSessionId.
Verify M06 resolveEffectivePolicy was consulted for edit-window and reason requirements.
Assert correlation ID links mutation to audit entry.
cases.expected: M05 module boundary commits AttendanceRecord with afterState Manual Present and checkInMethod Manual; exactly one audit_logs row records actorUserId, oldStatus Absent, newStatus Manual Present, reason, and occurredAt per FR-29 and BR-22.

cases.title: SM-03 AttendanceRecord transitions Pending to Manual Present and Present to Excused via lecturer correction
preconditions: Open then closed session exists in integration test database.
Student A has AttendanceRecord Pending (no successful check-in); student B has Present from QR check-in.
Assigned Lecturer is within manualEditWindow for both students.
steps: Capture beforeState for student A: status Pending; session state Closed.
Execute lecturer correction for student A with status Manual Present and required reason.
Capture afterState for student A and verify checkInMethod Manual.
Capture beforeState for student B: status Present, checkInMethod QR.
Execute lecturer correction for student B with status Excused and required reason.
Capture afterState for student B.
cases.expected: beforeState Pending transitions to afterState Manual Present; beforeState Present transitions to afterState Excused when lecturer is in scope and within edit window; session remains Closed; each transition is auditable per BR-14.

cases.title: Idempotent PATCH attendance correction returns prior applied mutation without duplicate audit rows
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; assigned Lecturer is within edit window.
Idempotency-Key header support is enabled for PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId}.
Real database with audit_logs immutability constraints.
steps: Issue PATCH correction with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key K1; record response.
Replay identical PATCH with same Idempotency-Key K1, same body, and same actor.
Query AttendanceRecord and audit_logs count for the student-session pair.
Compare second response to first accepted mutation summary.
cases.expected: First request applies correction and writes one audit row; replay returns already-applied mutation summary without second AttendanceRecord change or duplicate audit_logs entry per API idempotency rules.

cases.title: PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} returns 200 with updated status envelope
preconditions: Assigned Lecturer is authenticated with bearer token.
Closed session exists with student AttendanceRecord status Absent from session close.
Manual edit window is active; policy requires reason for corrections.
steps: Lecturer calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with body {"status": "Manual Present", "reason": "Sinh vien co mat nhung loi camera tren thiet bi."} and Idempotency-Key header.
Inspect HTTP status 200, response envelope data fields, and error is null.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance and locate the corrected student row.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs filtered by targetId and actionType for manual attendance update.
cases.expected: PATCH returns HTTP 200 with standard envelope; roster row shows attendanceStatus Manual Present and checkInMethod Manual; audit query returns entry with oldStatus Absent, newStatus Manual Present, actor, reason, and timestamp.

cases.title: POST /v1/enrollments/import seeds roster then lecturer PATCH corrects imported student attendance
preconditions: AcademicAdmin has created class section with closed session.
POST /v1/enrollments/import accepts enrolled student row for the section.
Session close assigned Absent to imported student without check-in.
Assigned Lecturer is within manualEditWindow.
steps: AcademicAdmin calls POST /v1/enrollments/import with classSectionId and valid studentCode rows; assert HTTP 200 with acceptedRows count and no silent row skips.
Verify imported student appears in GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance with Absent status.
Assigned Lecturer calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and reason.
Re-fetch GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for the imported student row.
cases.expected: Enrollment import establishes eligible roster per FR-04; lecturer manual correction on imported enrolled student succeeds with HTTP 200 PATCH and roster reflects Manual Present per FR-20 and BR-14.

cases.title: POST /v1/auth/login and GET /v1/me establish Lecturer context before PATCH attendance correction
preconditions: Lecturer account exists with institution-issued credentials and assigned class section scope.
Closed session with Absent student exists; manual edit window is active.
steps: Call POST /v1/auth/login with lecturer email and password; assert HTTP 200 with accessToken and roles including Lecturer.
Call GET /v1/me with Authorization bearer token; assert HTTP 200 with actor identity and assigned section scope claims.
Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with Manual Present status, reason, and Idempotency-Key using the same bearer token.
Inspect PATCH HTTP 200 response envelope and error is null.
cases.expected: Authenticated lecturer session per FR-15 and FR-36 gates PATCH attendance correction; GET /v1/me confirms Lecturer role and scope before FR-20 manual correction succeeds with HTTP 200.

cases.title: GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance live roster reflects manual correction payload shape
preconditions: Open or closed session exists with enrolled student showing Absent on roster.
Assigned Lecturer is authenticated and within manualEditWindow.
Baseline GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance captured before correction.
steps: Lecturer calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Late and documented reason.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance immediately after PATCH.
Assert HTTP 200 envelope with data.classSessionId, data.state, data.counts, and data.rows array.
Locate corrected student row and assert attendanceStatus Late, checkInMethod Manual, and counts reflect status change from baseline.
cases.expected: Live roster GET per FR-19 contract returns HTTP 200 with updated row showing attendanceStatus Late, checkInMethod Manual, and adjusted counts after FR-20 lecturer correction without full page reload at API layer.

cases.title: E2E-06 primary workflow lecturer manual correction in allowed window updates status and audit
preconditions: Lecturer opens and closes session for assigned section.
Session close assigns Absent to enrolled student without successful check-in.
Manual edit window from effective policy is not yet expired.
Lecturer bearer token is available.
steps: Lecturer reviews GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance showing student Absent.
Lecturer submits PATCH correction to Manual Present with documented reason after in-person verification.
Lecturer refreshes roster via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
AcademicAdmin or authorized role queries GET /v1/audit-logs for the correction event.
cases.expected: End-to-end E2E-06 happy path completes per FR-20: student status changes from Absent to Manual Present; roster reflects update; audit record is queryable with full actor/time/old/new/reason fields.

cases.title: Alternate branch lecturer corrects GPS-rejected Pending student to Manual Present within window
preconditions: Open session with GPS-required policy exists; student check-in rejected with OutOfRadius.
Student remains Pending on roster with failed attempt logged.
Lecturer verifies student in person and manual edit window is active per BR-14.
steps: Confirm GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance shows student Pending with latestAttemptOutcome OutOfRadius.
Lecturer calls PATCH correction with status Manual Present and reason after in-person verification.
Verify roster row and audit trail via GET attendance and GET audit-logs.
Confirm prior failed CheckInAttempt rows are preserved.
cases.expected: Manual fallback path per FR-20 succeeds within window: status becomes Manual Present without requiring QR re-check-in; failed GPS attempt history remains; audit captures old Pending to new Manual Present with reason.

cases.title: Flow C audit verification after lecturer manual attendance mutation
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists.
Assigned Lecturer performs in-window correction changing status to Excused with reason.
Audit query endpoint is available to AcademicAdmin or SystemAuditor read scope.
steps: Record roster status before correction via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Lecturer applies PATCH correction with status Excused and reason documenting excused absence.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with filters targetType AttendanceRecord, targetId, and time range covering correction.
Verify audit payload fields against CMP-01 minimum audit fields from roles-permissions doc.
cases.expected: Committed FR-20 mutation has corresponding audit record with actor, role Lecturer, target student/session, old status, new status Excused, reason, and timestamp; no mutation audit gap per BR-22.

cases.title: PATCH correction after edit window returns 409 EditWindowExpired and preserves Absent record
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; assigned Lecturer is in scope.
Effective policy manualEditWindow has elapsed since session closedAt.
Lecturer bearer token is authenticated.
steps: Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and valid reason.
Inspect HTTP status 409 and error.code EditWindowExpired in response envelope.
Query AttendanceRecord via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs for manual correction from this lecturer attempt.
cases.expected: Request is rejected with HTTP 409 and error.code EditWindowExpired per BR-15; AttendanceRecord remains Absent; no audit_logs mutation entry is written for the failed attempt.

cases.title: PATCH correction without required reason returns ReasonRequired and preserves prior status
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; assigned Lecturer is within edit window.
Effective policy mandates reason for all manual corrections.
Lecturer bearer token is authenticated.
steps: Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and empty or omitted reason field.
Inspect HTTP status and error.code in response envelope.
Query AttendanceRecord and audit_logs for the student-session pair.
Retry with valid reason as control to confirm window still active.
cases.expected: Request is rejected with validation error ReasonRequired (400 class); AttendanceRecord remains Absent; no audit_logs mutation entry is written; control request with reason succeeds.

cases.title: Student, SystemAuditor, ITAdmin, and out-of-scope Lecturer denied PATCH attendance correction
preconditions: Closed session in section A with Absent student; manual edit window is active.
Student, SystemAuditor, and ITAdmin bearer tokens and Lecturer token for unassigned section B are available.
Assigned Lecturer token for section A is available as authorized control.
steps: Student calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and reason.
SystemAuditor calls the same PATCH for the section A session.
ITAdmin calls the same PATCH without explicit academic grant.
Out-of-scope Lecturer (section B) calls the same PATCH for section A session.
Assigned Lecturer calls the same PATCH as control.
Verify AttendanceRecord state after denied attempts.
cases.expected: Student, SystemAuditor, and ITAdmin receive HTTP 403 Forbidden per permission matrix; out-of-scope Lecturer receives HTTP 403 OutOfScope per PRM-01; no attendance mutation or audit write occurs from denied roles; assigned Lecturer control succeeds and updates status per FR-20.

cases.title: Lecturer ManualCorrectionDialog on PG-06 submits correction with reason and updates roster badge
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated on desktop browser (PG-06 live roster view) for assigned section.
Closed session displays student row with Absent danger badge.
Manual edit window is active per effective policy; reason field is required.
steps: Navigate to /lecturer/sessions/{id}/roster and locate Absent student row.
Open ManualCorrectionDialog from row action; select Manual Present in status dropdown.
Enter reason in labeled Lý do textarea and confirm via dialog submit.
Observe AttendanceStatusCell updates to Manual Present success variant and summary chips refresh.
Verify dialog closes and roster row reflects corrected status without full page reload.
cases.expected: Browser FLOW-08 completes per FR-20: form gating enforces required reason before submit; post-save roster row shows Manual Present badge; UI state matches API correction and audit write.
